snippet.title: ΝΙΝΟ Ξυπολιτάς x Josephine – Τι Κάνεις; | Official Music Video (4K)
snippet.description:
🔔 Κάνε ΕΓΓΡΑΦΗ στο Official κανάλι του Nino Xypolitas εδώ: http://bit.ly/Nino_Sub
📌 Βρες το «Τι Κάνεις;» εδώ: https://outnow.io/t/ti-kaneis

Στίχοι:
Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάς την ημέρα,
Αν υπάρχω εγώ στον αέρα,
Που αναπνέεις κάθε πρωί.

Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάει ο χρόνος,
Αν σου λείπω κι αν είσαι μόνος,
Πες μου ακόμα αν μ’ αγαπάς.

Τι κάνεις,
Έχω ξεχάσει εντελώς τη φωνή σου,
Κι ας ήμουν τόσα χρόνια μαζί σου,
Θα ‘θελα σήμερα να ‘σουν εδώ.

Τι κάνεις,
Δεν ξέρω τίποτα για τη ζωή σου,
Κι ας ήμουν τόσο δεμένη μαζί σου,
Θα ’θελα τόσο πολύ να σε δω.

Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για ακόμα μια φορά,
Για τελευταία φορά.

Τι κάνεις,
Πες μου πώς περνάς τη ζωή σου,
Για πες μου, έχεις κάποιον μαζί σου,
Σε έχει αγαπήσει όσο εγώ.

Τι κάνεις,
Άραγε νιώθεις ακόμα για μένα,
Μετά από τόσα πολλά μπερδεμένα,
Πες μου αν σκέφτεσαι κι εσύ εμάς.

snippet.title: ΣΕΑ Αταλάντης - Σκιαδαρέσες
snippet.description:
Απόψε πάλι τα ίδια 
δεν ξύπνησα ευτυχισμένη 
το είχα πάθει και χθες και προχθές 
και ας ήμουν ωραία ντυμένη 

με πιάνει ταχυπαλμία 
και έχω μια συναυλία 
μια συναυλία να βγάλω 
δεν ξέρω τι λέω και 'γω ακόμα κλαίω 

τα κάνω όλα και δεν κάνω τίποτα
και τα προβλήματα μου είναι ασήκωτα 
που πάνε έτσι έξω τα ξετσίπωτα 
σε'μένα μιλάς 

παμ πα παραπαμ στα επείγοντα 
παμ πα παραπαμ με παυσίπονα 
παμ πα παραπαμ προσπαθούν να μην πεθάνουν πριν τα τριάντα 
παμ πα παραπαμ  κρίση πανικού 
παμ πα παραπαμ  σπρέι πιπεριού 
παμ πα παραπαμ  θα πληρώνουνε λογαριασμούς για πάντα 

απόψε πάλι κρατιέμαι 
να μην τα κάνω όλα λίμπα 
και προσπαθώ να'μαι ψύχραιμη 
να αιωρούμε σαν την Dua Lipa 

Τελειώνει η συναυλία 
να βγούμε φωτογραφία 
δώσε μου πέντε λεπτάκια 
να πάω να ουρλιάξω και θα'μαι κυρία. 

Είμαι ξετσίπωτη είμαι φασαία 
Είμαι ατάλαντη, ακραία 
και αν δεν στήριζε η μαμά και ο μπαμπάς 
θα'μουν υπάλληλος στα ΣΕΑ 
τι έχουν τα ΣΕΑ στο κάτω κάτω 
είναι η όαση της ασφάλτου 

Video: Αλέξανδρος Καπιδάκης, Θωμάς Ζάμπρας 
Στίχοι-μουσικη: ΣΚΙΑΔΑΡΕΣΕΣ 
Μπάσο,κρουστά,κιθάρα: Χάρης Παρασκευάς 
Beatbox,vocal effects: Γιώργος Γαργάλας 
Ηχοληψία,mastering: Κώστας Χαϊκάλης
Ενορχήστρωση-Παραγωγή: Tres Amigos 

Ευχαριστούμε πολύ τους : 
Piraeus Acropole Hotel, Σταυρός του Νότου, Γιάννη Μπράτση, Θωμά Ζάμπρα, Τόνια Μαράκη, Michael Moses.

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

snippet.title: ΒΑΪΑΝΑ (Vaiana) - official trailer (μεταγλ)
snippet.description:
9 Ιουλίου 2026 στα Village Cinemas.

Στην live-action προσαρμογή της Disney της αγαπημένης, υποψήφιας για Όσκαρ® ταινίας κινουμένων σχεδίων, η Βαϊάνα (Catherine Lagaʻaia) ανταποκρίνεται στο κάλεσμα του Ωκεανού και, για πρώτη φορά, ταξιδεύει πέρα από τον ύφαλο του νησιού της Motunui με τον περιβόητο ημίθεο Maui (Dwayne Johnson) σε ένα αξέχαστο ταξίδι για να αποκαταστήσει την ευημερία του λαού της.

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

snippet.title: Pokémon Champions – Overview Trailer – Nintendo Switch
snippet.description:
The Pokémon Champions game launches April 8, 2026 on the Nintendo Switch system. https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/pokemon-champions-switch/

Pokémon battles for everyone! Recruit Pokémon in-game or transfer them from Pokémon HOME, then gear up for thrilling battles with Trainers near and far! Compete in three different modes of Pokémon battles: Ranked Battles, Casual Battles, and Private Battles. You can challenge these modes in both Single Battle and Double Battle formats. Plus, use in-game Victory Points (VP) you’ve earned to improve a Pokémon’s stats, acquire new looks for your Trainer, and more!

The game is also compatible with the Nintendo Switch 2 system. 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Boney M. - Rasputin (Disco In The Snow, 09.04.1979)
snippet.description:
Boney M. performing "Rasputin" at Disco In The Snow in 1979. 

You can listen to all songs of Boney M. here: https://lnk.to/BoneyM 

Subscribe to the channel and activate notifications: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJOXLX2b_uMEct1r5F4PMXQ
► https://www.facebook.com/BoneyM.de 
► https://www.instagram.com/boneym.official/
► https://www.tiktok.com/@boneym.official

Footage licensed from BBC Studios Distribution. All rights reserved.
___________________________________________

Lyrics:

There lived a certain man in Russia long ago
He was big and strong, in his eyes a flaming glow
Most people looked at him with terror and with fear
But to Moscow chicks he was such a lovely dear
He could preach the bible like a preacher
Full of ecstasy and fire
But he also was the kind of teacher
Women would desire

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
There was a cat that really was gone
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

He ruled the Russian land and never mind the Czar
But the kasachok he danced really wunderbar
In all affairs of state he was the man to please
But he was real great when he had a girl to squeeze
For the queen he was no wheeler dealer
Though she'd heard the things he'd done
She believed he was a holy healer
Who would heal her son

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
There was a cat that really was gone
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

But when his drinking and lusting and his hunger
For power became known to more and more people
The demands to do something about this outrageous
Man became louder and louder

"This man's just got to go!" declared his enemies
But the ladies begged "Don't you try to do it, please"
No doubt this Rasputin had lots of hidden charms
Though he was a brute they just fell into his arms
Then one night some men of higher standing
Set a trap, they're not to blame
"Come to visit us" they kept demanding
And he really came

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
They put some poison into his wine
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
He drank it all and he said "I feel fine"

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen
They didn't quit, they wanted his head
RA RA RASPUTIN
Russia's greatest love machine
And so they shot him till he was dead

Oh, those Russians...


#BoneyM #Rasputin

snippet.title: Eλένη Χατζίδου x Τριαντάφυλλος Χατζίδης – Ακούς Πατέρα; | Official Music Video (4K)
snippet.description:
🔔 Κάνε ΕΓΓΡΑΦΗ εδώ: http://bit.ly/HeavenMusicYouTube
📌 Άκουσε το «Ακούς Πατέρα;» εδώ: https://lnk.to/Akous-Patera

Στίχοι:
Πόσα να ξέρεις σου χρωστάω ευχαριστώ,
Εσύ με έμαθες να μην τα παρατώ,
Όταν θα πέφτω μου είχες πει θα σηκωθώ,
Μέρα τη μέρα.

Πόσες κουβέντες που θεωρούσα υπερβολές,
Κι όλες εκείνες οι δικές σου συμβουλές,
Κοίτα που όλες ήταν πάντοτε σωστές,
Α ρε πατέρα.

Εγώ θα χαίρομαι καρδιά μου να σε βλέπω ευτυχισμένη,
Και η αγάπη μου για σένα πάντα εδώ θα περιμένει,
Πόσο περήφανο με κάνεις με όσα έχεις καταφέρει,
Και αν ποτέ με χρειαστείς κρατήσου απ’ το δικό μου χέρι.

Η πρώτη αγάπη μου εσύ,
Ο πρώτος ήρωας μου εσύ,
Σε κάθε νύχτα που με ρίχνει η ζωή,
Φέρνεις τη μέρα.

Στις πρώτες λέξεις μου εσύ,
Στα πρώτα βήματα μου εσύ,
Πες μου τι θα ’κανα αν δεν ήσουνα και εσύ,
Ακούς πατέρα;

Πόσα να ξέρεις σου χρωστάω ευχαριστώ,
Που χρόνια μου έλεγες ποτέ μη σταματώ,
Και άμα τα όνειρα δεν φτάσω θα ‘μαι εκεί,
Στη γειτονιά τους.

Κι όταν περάσανε τα χρόνια και οι στιγμές,
Είδα πως κλείνουνε του έρωτα οι πληγές,
Όπως μου έλεγες θα κάνουνε και αυτές,
Το πέρασμά τους.
